allow: PowerShell($out = "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads\\OllamaSetup.exe"; Write-Output "Downloading to $out ..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://ollama.com/download/OllamaSetup.exe" -OutFile $out; Write-Output "Downloaded. Size \(MB\):"; [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length/1MB,1\))

PowerShell($exe = "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads\\OllamaSetup.exe"; Write-Output "Installing Ollama silently..."; Start-Process -FilePath $exe -ArgumentList "/VERYSILENT","/SUPPRESSMSGBOXES","/NORESTART" -Wait; Write-Output "Installer finished.")
